---
titile: "Link"
comments: false
---

# Blog

These are some blogs I always visist.

[Bea Milz](https://beamilz.com/): Inspiring me to bulid my English blog with Quarto

[yihui](yihui.org): The first blog I read

[Cryus Yip](https://cyrusyip.org/en/): Living for himself

[Liechi](liechi.org): Be like a lighthouse with his thinking

# Forum

These are forums I always visist.

[Capital Of Statistics](https://cosx.org/): The largest Chinese R forum

[Github](https://github.com): A new world for me
